name: fast-prompt
description: Runs the submitted prompt as one focused task with a minimal execution prompt.

modes.label: Fast Prompt
modes.description: Run one prompt immediately as a single task.
modes.prompt_placeholder: Describe the change or action to perform.

tasks.name: Execute Prompt
tasks.description: Execute the prompt supplied when this workflow was launched.
acceptance_criteria: The submitted prompt is executed as directly as possible.
Relevant verification is run for any changed code.
Required changes are committed and the task is marked done.
